name: Corn Tamale Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Melt the butter and pour it into a 1-quart baking dish. Set aside.
3. Rinse the green chilis and cut them into thin strips.
4. Combine the corn, cornmeal, melted butter, sugar, and salt in a blender or food processor. Process until the corn is finely chopped.
5. Pour half of the mixture into the prepared baking dish. Spread it evenly and top with the chili strips.
6. Sprinkle the shredded cheddar cheese over the chili strips.
7. Top with the remaining corn mixture.
8. Cover the dish with foil and bake for 1 hour in the preheated oven.
9. While the casserole is baking, heat the stewed tomatoes and oregano in a small saucepan until heated through.
10. Serve the casserole topped with the warm tomato sauce.
Serves 4.
